# Companion Planting and Pollinators

Flowering companions draw pollinators that also help nearby crops set fruit
more reliably through a full growing season.

## Observations

- [requirement] Plant borage near tomatoes to draw pollinators early #companion
- [gotcha] Mint spreads aggressively and should stay containered #companion

## Relations

- "relates to" [[Phobos]]
